query: I just joined the team and I'm staring at this repo with no idea where anything lives — can you map out the architecture for me?
can you build a knowledge graph of this codebase so I can show the team how the services fit together
before you touch payment_service.py, can you show me everything that imports it so I know what I might break
I want a diagram of how our modules depend on each other for the architecture review doc on friday
new hire starts monday, can you put together something that shows how this repo is structured so onboarding is faster
which files in this project are the most central / most depended-on? trying to figure out what's risky to refactor
generate an interactive visualization of this repo's file dependencies that I can screen-share with the team
instead of you reading every file every session, can we build something once that captures the repo structure so future sessions are faster
can you fix the bug in payment_service.py where refunds double-charge the customer
write unit tests for the new validateEmail function in utils.js
can you draw me a sequence diagram of what happens when a user clicks checkout, step by step
what does this specific function do, walk me through auth/login.py line by line
create a slide deck summarizing our Q3 architecture decisions for leadership
can you refactor this class to use dependency injection instead of the singleton pattern
set up a GitHub Actions workflow that runs our test suite on every PR
explain what a dependency graph is and why they're useful in software architecture, just curious
review this PR and tell me if the changes look safe to merge
our node_modules folder is huge, can you find what's taking up the most space
